name: humble
title: humble
description:
HTTP Headers Analyzer
This package contains an  humble, and fast, security-oriented HTTP headers
analyzer.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use humble because HTTP Headers Analyzer.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use humble as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `humble [options] [args]` as documented upstream for humble.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair humble with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `humble --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
